No Psychosis Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that no hallucinations or delusions were present. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
163 E0200A_PHYS_BHVRL_CD E0200A_PHYS_BHVRL_CD E0200A Behavior: Physical Behavioral Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident has physical behavioral symptoms directed toward others (e.g., hitting, kicking, pushing, scratching, grabbing, abusing others sexually).
